content:
# Business Checking Product Comparison

## Product Lineup
Northstar Bank offers three business checking accounts for deposit customers. Use the account fit, transaction volume, and relationship balance facts below when comparing options.

| Account | Monthly fee | Opening deposit | Transaction band | Interest bearing | Earnings allowance |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---|---|
| Harbor Starter Business Checking | 15 | 25 | 100 | False | False |
| Harbor Growth Business Checking | 25 | 25 | 500 | True | False |
| Harbor Enterprise Business Checking | 75 | 25 | not specified | False | True |

## Balance Waiver Comparison
1. Harbor Starter Business Checking can use a minimum daily balance waiver of 2000 or a combined deposit balance waiver of 5000.
2. Harbor Growth Business Checking can use a minimum daily balance waiver of 10000 or a combined deposit balance waiver of 15000.
3. Harbor Enterprise Business Checking has no specified minimum daily balance waiver or combined deposit balance waiver. See "Business Checking Fee Waiver Policy" for how waiver facts are applied.

## Linked Account Allowances
Harbor Starter Business Checking includes 1 linked account and has an additional linked account fee of 0. Harbor Growth Business Checking includes 1 linked account and has an additional linked account fee of 0. Harbor Enterprise Business Checking includes 5 linked accounts and charges 30 for each additional linked account. For account-specific details, see "Harbor Starter Business Checking Terms" and "Harbor Growth Business Checking Terms".
title: Business Checking Product Comparison
